mapper.select: SELECT wda.id, TO_CHAR(wda.work_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS work_date, wda.assignment_type_cd, wat.assignment_type_nm, wda.work_area, wda.position, wda.worker_nm, wda.worker_cd, wda.plan_no, wda.work_request_no, wda.assignment_remarks, w.dept, w.prod_line FROM hkgn.worker_daily_assignment wda LEFT JOIN hkgn.worker_assignment_type wat ON wda.assignment_type_cd = wat.assignment_type_cd LEFT JOIN hkgn.worker w ON wda.worker_cd = w.worker_cd WHERE wda.work_date = TO_DATE(#{workDate}, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY CASE wda.work_area WHEN '복층1호기' THEN 1 WHEN '복층2호기' THEN 2 WHEN '재단/강화' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END, wda.id
SELECT id, assignment_type_cd, assignment_type_nm, description, sort_order, is_active FROM hkgn.worker_assignment_type WHERE is_active = true ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT DISTINCT TO_CHAR(work_date, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS work_date FROM hkgn.worker_daily_assignment ORDER BY work_date DESC
